title: Frogx's Simple Rpg Datapack
description:
Upgrade Your Stats Using Your Vanilla Levels
Use This To Just Play Minecraft 
Or To Try To Speedrun The Game
body:
Elevate your Minecraft journey with this easy-to-use datapack! Just type `/trigger Upgrade_Stats` to upgrade three key attributes using your levels:

- **Strength:** Boost attack damage.
- **Health:** Increase maximum health.
- **Agility:** Improve attack speed.

Check your stats anytime with `/trigger Stats`. Level up and enhance your gameplay effortlessly!


(**It Will Say Wrong Version It Will Work Anyways! When Putting In The Datapack In Your World**)
